description: Read a Firestore collection (or subcollection) into a pandas DataFrame.

outputs.description: Documents from the Firestore collection with doc id in the `_id` column.

asset_name.label: Asset Name
asset_name.description: Name of the asset to create.

resource_name.label: Resource Name
resource_name.description: Name of the FirebaseResource this asset uses.

where_clauses.label: Where Clauses
where_clauses.description: List of {field, op, value} filter dicts. Ops: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=, in, not-in, array-contains, array-contains-any.

limit.label: Limit
limit.description: Optional maximum number of documents to read.

asset_tags.label: Asset Tags
asset_tags.description: Additional key-value tags for the asset.

include_preview_metadata.label: Include Preview Metadata
include_preview_metadata.description: Include a sample preview in the run metadata.

preview_rows.label: Preview Rows
preview_rows.description: Rows to include in the preview.

name: Firestore Collection Ingestion
